mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, created_at, updated_at FROM articles ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, title, content, tags_json, summary, created_at, updated_at FROM articles
(title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND tags_json LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles (title, content, tags_json, summary, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{tagsJson}, #{summary}, NOW(), NOW())
